rationale: Audience overlap is strong — the calm, satisfaction-led jigsaw hook targets the same 25-55 casual puzzle demographic Bounce Blast 3D wants. However, there are two real frictions: (1) the member palette is light/airy (greys, sky blue, green) which clashes hard with the game's dark moody purple + yellow-orange accent, so creatives would need a full recolor pass; (2) jigsaw drag-and-place only partially mirrors the core loop — tap-to-place tray onto grid is on-brand, but the hook completely misses the physics chain-reaction payoff that is the game's actual "satisfaction" beat. Recommend testing only if reshot with the game's dark palette AND extending past 3s into a ball-bounce chain reaction reveal.
